parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ workflow: 'tech-stack-resolver', projectId: $json.projectId, result: { resolvedStack: $json.resolvedStack, rationale: $json.rationale, summary: $json.summary }, completedAt: $json.completedAt }) }}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ success: true, workflow: 'tech-stack-resolver', resolvedStack: $('Resolve Stack').first().json.resolvedStack, rationale: $('Resolve Stack').first().json.rationale, summary: $('Resolve Stack').first().json.summary, completedAt: $('Resolve Stack').first().json.completedAt }) }}
